## Analysis Suggests Broadcom Stock May Be Approximately 10% Undervalued Despite AI Selloff Concerns

If AVGO is trading at a discount to intrinsic value near record prices, the stock may have further re-rating room even after its recent run; the 'despite AI selloff fears' framing is constructive — it implies valuation has already partially absorbed sector risk.

- Valuation analysis frames AVGO as roughly 10% undervalued at current levels.
- Thesis holds even accounting for AI selloff fears in the broader market.
- Medium classifier confidence; single-outlet buy-side framing, no methodology disclosed in headline.
- Complements record-price headlines in clusters fd73b2ec and 24b616557.
